mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE 1=1
AND student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')
AND student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
AND student_dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM departments WHERE dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentDept}, '%') )
AND student_DOB LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentDOB}, '%')
AND student_sex = #{studentSex}
